image_prompt: A dramatic photorealistic image of a gas station price display showing '2,000' in bright red LED digits against a dark night sky. In the background, a silhouette of oil tankers on the ocean with a fiery orange and red sunset reflecting on the water. The atmosphere is tense and cinematic, with warm orange tones contrasting dark shadows. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements

A photorealistic aerial view of the Strait of Hormuz with a single oil tanker passing through the narrow waterway between Iran and Oman. The water is deep blue, the land is arid and sandy. Military ships are visible in the distance creating a tense blockade atmosphere. Dramatic clouds and golden light create a cinematic mood. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements

A photorealistic image of a split screen concept: on the left side, a Korean gas station with cars lined up showing expensive fuel prices, illuminated at night with neon lights. On the right side, a dramatic view of oil pipelines and refineries with flames and smoke against a dark sky. The mood is urgent and impactful with high contrast lighting.
